title: Davallia macgillivrayi
taxonomy: Davallia macgillivrayi is classified within the family Davalliaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the lady ferns or Davallia ferns. This family is further divided into two main subfamilies: Araiostemeae and Davallieae.
